eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Kalamazoo; Cass; St. Joseph; Branch; Allegan; Barry; Eaton; Van Buren; Ottawa; Kent; Ionia; Clinton; Ingham; Jackson; Hillsdale; Calhoun; Berrien, MI; at 10:25 PM on APR 30, 2019 Effective until 12:25 AM MAY 1, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED FOR A CALISTA KAY ROSE 16 YEARS OLD WHITE FEMALE WITH HAZ EYES AND BLACK HAIR WHO WAS LAST SEEN WEARING A BLACK TSHIRT WITH A PINK WINTER COAT.  SHE WAS LAST SEEN IN THE CITY OF GALESBURG IN KALAMAZOO COUNTY ON 4-30-19 AT 130 A.M.  CALISTA MAY BE WITH A SAMUEL LEROY CHRISPENS 45 YEAR OLD WHITE MALE WHO MAY BE DRIVING AT 2011 CHRYSLER 4DR GRAY IN COLOR WITH MICHIGAN REGISTRATION OF 1MCW51.  IF LOCATED PLEASE CALL MSP PAW PAW POST AT 269-657-5551 OR KALAMAZOO CO SO AT 269-383-8722 OR CALL 911. Tune to local media for further information.
